subclasses.name: Brawler
subclasses.description: Raw fists and ferocity. You break bones before shields.

subclasses.name: Martial Artist
subclasses.description: Discipline perfected. Every strike is a kata, every dodge a lesson.
subclasses.flavorText: The body is the ultimate weapon.

subclasses.name: Guardian
subclasses.description: An immovable wall. Allies survive because you refuse to fall.

subclasses.name: Bulwark Knight
subclasses.description: Living fortress. Catastrophic blows slide off your plate like rain.

subclasses.name: Weaponmaster
subclasses.description: Master of every blade. Precision over power.

subclasses.name: Blade Dancer
subclasses.description: A whirlwind of steel. Enemies fall before they understand the rhythm.

subclasses.name: Warlord
subclasses.description: Command the battlefield. Your presence turns skirmishes into victories.

subclasses.name: Siegebreaker
subclasses.description: Fortresses crumble. You are the battering ram incarnate.

subclasses.name: Paladin
subclasses.description: A holy warrior blending sword and faith. Origin determines whether you favor shield or tome.

subclasses.name: Paladin Ascended
subclasses.description: Avatar of divine wrath and mercy combined.

subclasses.name: Assassin
subclasses.description: One strike, one corpse. Contracts are your prayer book.

subclasses.name: Ghostblade
subclasses.description: You kill so cleanly that witnesses swear no one was there.

subclasses.name: Trickster
subclasses.description: Misdirection is your art. The truth is whatever you need it to be.

subclasses.name: Grand Illusionist
subclasses.description: Reality bends to your schemes. Even mages doubt their eyes.

subclasses.name: Swashbuckler
subclasses.description: Flash, flair, and fatal accuracy. Style points included.

subclasses.name: Sea Devil
subclasses.description: Storm-lashed decks and drowned gold. The ocean remembers your name.

subclasses.name: Shadow
subclasses.description: Darkness is home. You walk where light fears to follow.

subclasses.name: Void Walker
subclasses.description: Step between shadows across any distance. Distance is a suggestion.

subclasses.name: Poisoner
subclasses.description: Every blade drips. Death arrives slowly, painfully, beautifully.

subclasses.name: Plague Lord
subclasses.description: Your toxins spread like gossip. Entire courts fall overnight.

subclasses.name: Pyromancer
subclasses.description: Fire answers your call. Ash is your signature.

subclasses.name: Inferno Archon
subclasses.description: You wield conflagration like a crown. Dragons nod in respect.

subclasses.name: Cryomancer
subclasses.description: Winter obeys. Hearts freeze before bodies do.

subclasses.name: Frost Sovereign
subclasses.description: Throne of ice, empire of silence. Time itself slows in your domain.

subclasses.name: Arcanist
subclasses.description: Pure arcane theory made lethal. You rewrite the rules mid-spell.

subclasses.name: Void Scholar
subclasses.description: You peer into the spaces between spells. Reality leaks.

subclasses.name: Summoner
subclasses.description: Allies from beyond bind to your will—for a price.

subclasses.name: Pact Master
subclasses.description: Multiple entities owe you favors. You collect with interest.

subclasses.name: Enchanter
subclasses.description: Objects become extensions of will. Your gear fights for you.

subclasses.name: Rune Emperor
subclasses.description: Sigils cover your skin. You are a walking arcane engine.

subclasses.name: Cleric
subclasses.description: Healing hands and holy word. The flock looks to you.

subclasses.name: High Cleric
subclasses.description: Miracles flow through you. Death reconsidered its options.

subclasses.name: Inquisitor
subclasses.description: Heresy burns. Your questions come with iron and fire.

subclasses.name: Witch Hunter
subclasses.description: No curse hides from you. Monsters have learned your name.

subclasses.name: Bard
subclasses.description: A traveling minstrel who weaves hymns into battle songs. Support through music and retained divine gifts.

subclasses.name: Maestro
subclasses.description: Your performances reshape the battlefield.

subclasses.name: Oracle
subclasses.description: Visions guide your hand. Fate whispers its secrets.

subclasses.name: Fate Weaver
subclasses.description: Threads of destiny bend. Enemies stumble into their own doom.

subclasses.name: Exorcist
subclasses.description: Spirits flee your presence. The veil is thin around you.

subclasses.name: Soul Binder
subclasses.description: You command the dead and damned. They serve or shatter.

subclasses.name: Marksman
subclasses.description: One shot, one kill. Distance is your ally.

subclasses.name: Deadeye
subclasses.description: Legendary aim. Targets fall before the arrow is loosed.

subclasses.name: Beastmaster
subclasses.description: The wild fights beside you. Pack tactics win wars.

subclasses.name: Alpha Prime
subclasses.description: King of beasts. Even drakes hesitate before your pack.

subclasses.name: Warden
subclasses.description: Protector of paths and borders. Nothing passes unmarked.

subclasses.name: Storm Ranger
subclasses.description: Lightning answers your arrows. The sky is your weapon.

subclasses.name: Stalker
subclasses.description: Silent pursuit. Prey realizes too late they were hunted hours ago.

subclasses.name: Silent Death
subclasses.description: You are the forest's judgment. No footprint, no mercy.

subclasses.name: Survivalist
subclasses.description: The wilderness sustains you. Cities feel like cages.

subclasses.name: Wild Avatar
subclasses.description: You become the storm, the thorn, the predator. Civilization is a memory.
